task_brief: Reproduce the public GeneLab benchmark evaluation workflow using staged feature matrices, mission-safe split logic, classical baselines, and structured benchmark outputs.
analysis_focus: load benchmark-ready feature matrices and split definitions without train-test leakage
run leave-one-mission-out and transfer-style evaluation logic for multiple classical baselines
emit AUROC, confidence intervals, permutation outputs, and interpretability artifacts in structured files
stage a rerunnable submission while documenting any optional Geneformer or HPC-only extensions
success_checks: the workflow preserves mission-aware evaluation boundaries
multiple baseline models are compared under identical split definitions
negative controls and confidence intervals are reported rather than skipped
optional Geneformer steps are staged honestly when GPU or cached embeddings are unavailable
public_data_sources: benchmark-prepared feature matrices and metadata tables staged under the paper bundle
reviewer_path: Use benchmark-staged feature matrices and metadata in the default path. If those inputs are missing, use data/prepare_data.sh to fetch the public repository and dataset bundle, then document any remaining heavy Geneformer steps separately.
